subcodes.first_line: O ye children of the Kingdom! The letter that ye have written, although short and significant, was a manifest book
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء ملکوت نامه ایکه نگاشته بودید هر چند مختصر و مفید بود ولی کتابی مبین و دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
